purpose: Starting component maps. Replace every placeholder with an evidence-backed low/base/high range before a schedule is complete.

resource_or_land_owner: undeveloped reserves or acreage by development bucket
surface or real estate by use bucket
scarce_strategic_asset: cash, debt, minority claims, and realization reserve

valuation_range_rule: Supply either valuation.low/base/high with a supported basis or valuation.driver_model with low/base/high scenarios.

driver_models.revenue_owner_cash_dcf: Capital-free royalty, toll, or lease revenue converted to after-tax owner cash.
driver_models.reinvestment_return_dcf: Infrastructure or service growth that explicitly charges the capital needed to create incremental owner cash.
driver_models.unit_nav: Acreage, reserves, rights, or other units multiplied by a unit mark, realization probability, economic claim, and friction.
driver_models.milestone_project_option: Uncontracted project success value multiplied by milestone probability and ownership, less remaining cost.
